tenders.body: The Crop Trust / Power of Diversity Funding Facility
tenders.title: Power of Diversity Grants Program — Climate-Resilient Opportunity Crops (Kenya, Tanzania, Uganda)
tenders.eligibility: NGOs, agri-businesses, research institutions and farmer organisations across Kenya, Tanzania and Uganda. Annual revenue (2023–2025) must exceed proposed project budget.
tenders.notes: Grant targeting underutilised, climate-resilient crops. Projects must focus on productivity improvement, post-harvest processing or market access. Enquiries: powerofdiversitygrants@croptrust.org

tenders.body: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (FAO Tanzania)
tenders.title: Supply and Installation of Walk-In Cold Rooms and Cold Chain Equipment
tenders.eligibility: Registered suppliers and installation contractors with cold chain and refrigeration experience
tenders.notes: ITB for supply and physical installation of walk-in cold rooms and cold chain equipment to support agricultural and fisheries preservation. TZT Ref No.: 143114122.

tenders.body: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (FAO Tanzania) / AFR100 Initiative
tenders.title: Sustainable Landscape Restoration and Livelihood Development — RFP
tenders.eligibility: Consultancy firms and organisations with experience in landscape restoration, agroforestry and rural livelihood development
tenders.notes: RFP under the AFR100 Initiative focusing on developing livelihoods through the restoration of sustainable agricultural landscapes in Tanzania.

tenders.body: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (FAO Tanzania)
tenders.title: Agricultural Gender Policy Assessment — Individual Consultancy
tenders.eligibility: Individual consultants or firms with expertise in gender policy and agricultural policy analysis in Tanzania
tenders.notes: RFP seeking a qualified consultant to conduct a comprehensive assessment of gender policies within local agricultural frameworks in Tanzania.

tenders.title: Working Jointly in Agriculture — Contractors and Suppliers Sought
tenders.notes: Collaborative agricultural project seeking contractors and suppliers for joint operations in Tanzania. TZT Ref No.: 142413118.

tenders.body: Ministry of Agriculture, Animal Industry and Fisheries — Uganda
tenders.title: Uganda Climate Smart Agricultural Transformation Project — Invitation for Bids
tenders.eligibility: Qualified contractors, technology providers and agri-businesses with climate-smart agricultural experience
tenders.notes: Major government-funded initiative to transform Uganda's agricultural landscape with climate-smart technologies and practices. Project reference P173296.
